AI Agents & Frameworks.title: New ways to build with Jules, our AI coding agent
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Google introduces Jules, an AI coding agent, offering new tools and APIs for developers to build innovative applications. This release enhances capabilities for creating and integrating AI into coding workflows.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Agentic Design Methodology: How to Build Reliable and Human-Like AI Agents using Parlant
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This article details the Agentic Design Methodology, providing a structured approach to building reliable and human-like AI agents. It highlights the use of Parlant as a tool to implement these advanced agent systems.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: How to Evaluate Voice Agents in 2025: Beyond Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) and Word Error Rate (WER) to Task Success, Barge-In, and Hallucination-Under-Noise
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This analysis discusses advanced metrics for evaluating voice agents in 2025, moving beyond traditional ASR and WER. It emphasizes assessing task success, barge-in capabilities, and hallucination-under-noise for a comprehensive performance review.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Google Proposes TUMIX: Multi-Agent Test-Time Scaling With Tool-Use Mixture
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Google introduces TUMIX, a novel approach for multi-agent test-time scaling that integrates tool-use mixtures. This proposal aims to enhance the efficiency and versatility of multi-agent systems in various applications.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Accelerating Qwen3-8B Agent on Intel® Core™ Ultra with Depth-Pruned Draft Models
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This technical article explores methods for accelerating the Qwen3-8B AI agent on Intel Core Ultra processors. It focuses on using depth-pruned draft models to achieve significant performance enhancements.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: My TOP 5 Agentic Bets: Multi-Agent UI & Compute Scaling (Not for beginners)
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This video discusses the top five "agentic bets," focusing on advancements in multi-agent user interfaces and compute scaling. It offers insights into complex topics for experienced AI developers.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Agentic Coding ENDGAME: Build your Claude Code SDK Custom Agents
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This video guides viewers on building custom AI agents using the Claude Code SDK, positioning it as a significant step in agentic coding. It demonstrates how to leverage the SDK for tailored agent development.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Agentic Prompt Engineering with Claude Code (For you, your team, and your AGENTS)
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This video explores agentic prompt engineering with Claude Code, providing strategies for optimizing prompts for human teams and AI agents alike. It focuses on enhancing the effectiveness of AI interactions and workflows.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Agentic Workflows: BEYOND the Chat UI with Claude Code SDK and Gemini Nano Banana
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This video delves into building advanced agentic workflows that extend beyond traditional chat interfaces, utilizing the Claude Code SDK and Gemini Nano Banana. It showcases integrating powerful AI tools for complex automation.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Deploy an AI Agent to Production in 2 Minutes
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This video offers a quick guide on deploying an AI agent into a production environment, claiming a rapid setup time of two minutes. It provides practical steps for operationalizing AI agents efficiently.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: The Last Multi-Agent Framework You Will Ever Need
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This video presents a multi-agent framework, ambitiously claiming it to be the ultimate solution for developers. It introduces a comprehensive framework designed to address various multi-agent system needs.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Kestra: Easily Create AI Agents That Can Automate Anything! Opensource n8n Alternative!
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This video introduces Kestra, an open-source workflow orchestration and scheduling platform touted as an n8n alternative, enabling users to easily create AI agents for automating diverse tasks. It highlights its capability to automate a wide range of processes.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Claude Code 2.0: NEW Agentic AI Coding Agent + Extension IS POWERFUL!
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This video announces Claude Code 2.0, a new version of the agentic AI coding agent, highlighting its powerful new features and extensions. It demonstrates the enhanced capabilities for AI-assisted coding.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: How To Build AI Agents To Automate EVERYTHING (n8n tutorial)
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This n8n tutorial demonstrates how to leverage the platform to build AI agents capable of automating a wide array of tasks. It provides practical steps for creating comprehensive automation workflows using AI.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: hsliuping / TradingAgents-CN
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This GitHub repository, "TradingAgents-CN," provides code and resources for building AI agents specialized in financial trading. It offers a technical implementation for developing automated trading strategies using AI.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: A generalist AI agent for 3D virtual environments
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This article discusses a generalist AI agent designed to operate effectively within complex 3D virtual environments. It explores the agent's capabilities in interacting with and navigating diverse virtual worlds.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Building Effective AI Agents
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This post from Anthropic Engineering delves into the principles and practices for building effective AI agents. It offers insights into the key considerations for designing robust and high-performing agent systems.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: CICERO: An AI agent that negotiates, persuades, and cooperates with people
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Meta AI introduces CICERO, an AI agent uniquely capable of negotiating, persuading, and cooperating with human players in complex social deduction games. This highlights advancements in human-AI interaction and strategy.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Why we no longer use LangChain for building our AI agents
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This article explains why Octomind transitioned away from using LangChain for building their AI agents, detailing the challenges and motivations behind their decision. It offers insights into practical considerations when choosing AI agent frameworks.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Koinify: The Future of Crypto Crowd Funding
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Koinify is presented as a platform aiming to redefine the future of cryptocurrency crowdfunding. It suggests new approaches to how crypto projects secure capital.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Crypto’s new funding mechanisms: down and dirty guide
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: This guide explains new and evolving funding mechanisms within the cryptocurrency space, such as STOs and IEOs. It offers an in-depth look at how crypto projects are securing capital beyond traditional methods.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Nasdaq, Citi Join Novogratz in Funding Blockchain Firm Symbiont
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Nasdaq and Citi have joined Mike Novogratz in a funding round for Symbiont, a blockchain firm. This investment highlights significant institutional interest in blockchain technology.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Homeland Security Funding Blockchain Technology via SBIRs
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: The Department of Homeland Security is utilizing Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) grants to fund the development of blockchain technology. This initiative demonstrates government investment in advancing blockchain solutions for national security.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Funding Blockchain Ecosystems
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: This article explores various strategies and challenges involved in effectively funding blockchain ecosystems. It delves into the diverse mechanisms required to support the growth and development of distributed ledger technologies.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Indian Banks to Start Blockchain-Based Funding for SMEs to Avoid Defaulters
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Indian banks are set to implement blockchain-based funding solutions for Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) to enhance credit assessment and reduce defaults. This initiative introduces a new framework for financial transactions and risk management in the banking sector.
